action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 26 trained 5-member MLP ensemble with esm2_t30_150M (subsequence features). Val Spearman ~0.86 per member. Best test Spearman is 0.7432 (iter 9, 35M model). Analysis: 150M features might help extrapolation to >2 mutations despite lower val score. The subsequence approach (28 AA) keeps inference fast enough for eval. Need to test this immediately. Decision: Submit eval for 150M model to measure test Spearman. If worse than 0.7432, will try other approaches in remaining iterations.
